long_tail_signals.Event: ('MAPT', 'Gene', 'dbSNP', ('MAPT', 'Gene', '4137', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('P301L', 'Var', '(274, 279)', ('P301L', 'Mutation', 'rs63751273', '-')) -- CauseOf -- ('upregulation', 'PosReg', '(221, 233)', ('upregulation', 'PosReg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('paralleling the astrogliosis', 'Disease', '(322, 350)', ('paralleling the astrogliosis', 'Disease', 'MESH:C536085', '-'))
long_tail_signals.EventDedupKey: gene | normalized variants:dna change | mesh:c536085 | neuroinflammation hypothesis
long_tail_signals.Sentence: We found that Gfap was dramatically upregulated across age groups (Figure 3A; likelihood ratio test [LRT] statistic = 106.321, FDR = 1.28E-18), similar to results from another study reporting age-dependent (12-18 months) upregulation of hippocampal Gfap in tau (CaMKII-MAPT P301L) and amyloid (APP/PSEN1) mouse models and paralleling the astrogliosis observed in human AD brain.

long_tail_signals.Event: ('MAPT', 'Gene', '(249, 253)', ('MAPT', 'Gene', '17762', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('knockout', 'Var', '(43, 51)', ('knockout', 'Mutation', 'genetic manipulation:knockout', 'genetic manipulation:knockout')) -- CauseOf -- ('resulted in', 'Reg', '(134, 145)', ('resulted in', 'Reg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('protein metabolism', 'MPA', '(159, 177)', ('protein metabolism', 'MPA', 'GO:0019538', 'protein metabolic process'))
long_tail_signals.EventDedupKey: gene | genetic manipulation:knockout | go:0019538 | tau protein hypothesis
long_tail_signals.Sentence: Recent studies have shown that conditional knockout of the Dicer gene in the mouse brain created an extensive miRNA deficiency, which resulted in abnormal Tau protein metabolism in mice with AD-like Tau hyperphosphorylation and aberrant splicing of MAPT.

long_tail_signals.Hypothesis: Tau Protein Hypothesis,Neuroinflammation Hypothesis,Oxidative Stress Hypothesis
long_tail_signals.Event: ('MAPT', 'Gene', '(140, 144)', ('MAPT', 'Gene', '4137', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('mutations', 'Var', '(110, 119)', ('mutations', 'Mutation', 'point mutations:Mutations', 'point mutations:Mutations')) -- CauseOf -- ('Increased', 'PosReg', '(46, 55)', ('Increased', 'PosReg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('enzyme activity', 'MPA', '(56, 71)', ('enzyme activity', 'MPA', 'GO:0003824', 'catalytic activity'))
long_tail_signals.EventDedupKey: gene | point mutations:mutations | go:0003824 | tau protein hypothesis,neuroinflammation hypothesis,oxidative stress hypothesis
long_tail_signals.Sentence: This occurs through the following mechanisms: Increased enzyme activity of Cdk5 or GSK-3beta, decreased PPA2, mutations associated with the MAPT gene, increased neuroinflammatory response, enhanced influx of intracellular Ca2+, and impairment of oxidative phosphorylation.

long_tail_signals.Event: ('MAPT', 'Gene', '(28, 32)', ('MAPT', 'Gene', '4137', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('haplotype', 'Var', '(33, 42)', ('haplotype', 'Mutation', '-', '-')) -- CauseOf -- ('associated', 'Reg', '(131, 141)', ('associated', 'Reg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('progressive supranuclear palsy', 'Disease', '(147, 177)', ('progressive supranuclear palsy', 'Disease', 'MESH:D013494', '-'))
long_tail_signals.EventDedupKey: gene | structural variation:chromosomal variation | mesh:d013494 | tau protein hypothesis
long_tail_signals.Sentence: Studies have shown that the MAPT haplotype can influence the development of neurodegenerative disorders: the H1 haplotype has been associated with progressive supranuclear palsy, corticobasal degeneration, and Alzheimer's disease (AD).

long_tail_signals.EventDedupKey: gene | point mutations:mutations | mesh:c536599 | tau protein hypothesis
long_tail_signals.Sentence: Tauopathies are traditionally defined as a group of conditions that result from tau hyperphosphorylation, abnormal tau splicing, or mutations in the microtubule-associated protein tau (MAPT) gene.

long_tail_signals.Sentence: GO terms related to fatty acid synthesis were enriched in the genes upregulated in MAPT mutant astrocytes (Figure 3B), including the fatty acid synthase gene FASN (Figure S4F), modulating neurodegeneration-related toxicities.

long_tail_signals.Sentence: One LRRK2 p.G2019S case, which also involved the MAPT variant p.Q124E, was described with occasional TDP-43 inclusions, nigral degeneration without Lewy bodies, and Alzheimer-type tau pathology.

long_tail_signals.Event: ('MAPT', 'Gene', '(124, 128)', ('MAPT', 'Gene', '4137', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('mutation', 'Var', '(129, 137)', ('mutation', 'Mutation', 'point mutations:Mutations', 'point mutations:Mutations')) -- CauseOf -- ('elevated', 'PosReg', '(19, 27)', ('elevated', 'PosReg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('acetylcholinesterase activity', 'MPA', '(173, 202)', ('acetylcholinesterase activity', 'MPA', 'GO:0003990', 'acetylcholinesterase activity'))
long_tail_signals.EventDedupKey: gene | point mutations:mutations | go:0003990 | cholinergic hypothesis,tau protein hypothesis,neuroinflammation hypothesis
long_tail_signals.Sentence: Glial activity was elevated in the frontal cortex, the posterior cingulate cortex, and the occipital cortex of asymptomatic MAPT mutation carriers on [11C] DAA1106 PET, and acetylcholinesterase activity was reduced in the temporo-parietal cortex using [11C] N-methylpiperidin-4-yl acetate PET in three asymptomatic MAPT mutation carriers.

long_tail_signals.Sentence: The 3x Tg-AD mouse model bears mutations in three genes involved in familial AD: APP; PSEN1; and MAPT, encoding amyloid precursor protein; presenilin-1 (part of the gamma-secretase complex); and tau.

long_tail_signals.Event: ('MAPT', 'Gene', '(186, 190)', ('MAPT', 'Gene', '4137', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('mutations', 'Var', '(169, 178)', ('mutations', 'Mutation', 'point mutations:Mutations', 'point mutations:Mutations')) -- CauseOf -- ('associated', 'Reg', '(49, 59)', ('associated', 'Reg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('corticobasal ganglionic degeneration', 'Disease', '(127, 163)', ('corticobasal ganglionic degeneration', 'Disease', 'MESH:D000088282', '-'))
long_tail_signals.EventDedupKey: gene | point mutations:mutations | mesh:d000088282 | tau protein hypothesis
long_tail_signals.Sentence: The abnormal aggregation of tau protein has been associated with a variety of neurodegenerative diseases, such as AD, FTD, and corticobasal ganglionic degeneration, and mutations in the MAPT gene are thought to be an important cause; thus, the MAPT gene has significance for the study of neurodegenerative diseases.

long_tail_signals.Sentence: Mutations in the SNCA, TARDBP and MAPT genes that alter specific amino acids also increase the risk for neurodegenerative disease and are thought to do so by increasing the rate of protein self-association.

mitochondrial and oxidative stress axis.EventDedupKey: gene | point mutations:mutations | go:0003824 | tau protein hypothesis,neuroinflammation hypothesis,oxidative stress hypothesis
mitochondrial and oxidative stress axis.Sentence: This occurs through the following mechanisms: Increased enzyme activity of Cdk5 or GSK-3beta, decreased PPA2, mutations associated with the MAPT gene, increased neuroinflammatory response, enhanced influx of intracellular Ca2+, and impairment of oxidative phosphorylation.

neuroinflammation and microglia axis.Event: ('MAPT', 'Gene', 'dbSNP', ('MAPT', 'Gene', '4137', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('P301L', 'Var', '(274, 279)', ('P301L', 'Mutation', 'rs63751273', '-')) -- CauseOf -- ('upregulation', 'PosReg', '(221, 233)', ('upregulation', 'PosReg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('paralleling the astrogliosis', 'Disease', '(322, 350)', ('paralleling the astrogliosis', 'Disease', 'MESH:C536085', '-'))
neuroinflammation and microglia axis.EventDedupKey: gene | normalized variants:dna change | mesh:c536085 | neuroinflammation hypothesis
neuroinflammation and microglia axis.Sentence: We found that Gfap was dramatically upregulated across age groups (Figure 3A; likelihood ratio test [LRT] statistic = 106.321, FDR = 1.28E-18), similar to results from another study reporting age-dependent (12-18 months) upregulation of hippocampal Gfap in tau (CaMKII-MAPT P301L) and amyloid (APP/PSEN1) mouse models and paralleling the astrogliosis observed in human AD brain.

proteostasis/autophagy axis.Sentence: Studies have shown that the MAPT haplotype can influence the development of neurodegenerative disorders: the H1 haplotype has been associated with progressive supranuclear palsy, corticobasal degeneration, and Alzheimer's disease (AD).

vascular/metabolic axis.Event: ('MAPT', 'Gene', '(249, 253)', ('MAPT', 'Gene', '17762', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('knockout', 'Var', '(43, 51)', ('knockout', 'Mutation', 'genetic manipulation:knockout', 'genetic manipulation:knockout')) -- CauseOf -- ('resulted in', 'Reg', '(134, 145)', ('resulted in', 'Reg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('protein metabolism', 'MPA', '(159, 177)', ('protein metabolism', 'MPA', 'GO:0019538', 'protein metabolic process'))
vascular/metabolic axis.EventDedupKey: gene | genetic manipulation:knockout | go:0019538 | tau protein hypothesis
vascular/metabolic axis.Sentence: Recent studies have shown that conditional knockout of the Dicer gene in the mouse brain created an extensive miRNA deficiency, which resulted in abnormal Tau protein metabolism in mice with AD-like Tau hyperphosphorylation and aberrant splicing of MAPT.

selected_evidence.Event: ('MAPT', 'Gene', 'dbSNP', ('MAPT', 'Gene', '4137', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('P301L', 'Var', '(274, 279)', ('P301L', 'Mutation', 'rs63751273', '-')) -- CauseOf -- ('upregulation', 'PosReg', '(221, 233)', ('upregulation', 'PosReg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('paralleling the astrogliosis', 'Disease', '(322, 350)', ('paralleling the astrogliosis', 'Disease', 'MESH:C536085', '-'))

selected_evidence.Sentence: We found that Gfap was dramatically upregulated across age groups (Figure 3A; likelihood ratio test [LRT] statistic = 106.321, FDR = 1.28E-18), similar to results from another study reporting age-dependent (12-18 months) upregulation of hippocampal Gfap in tau (CaMKII-MAPT P301L) and amyloid (APP/PSEN1) mouse models and paralleling the astrogliosis observed in human AD brain.
